name: DLATCH
description: D Latch - transparent latch where output follows input when enable is high
xmlExample: <BasicBlock id="..." parent="..." interfaceFunctionName="DLATCH" blockType="h" dependsOnU="1" dependsOnT="0" simulationFunctionName="csuper" simulationFunctionType="DEFAULT" style="DLATCH"><ScilabDouble as="exprs" height="0" width="0"/><ScilabDouble as="realParameters" height="0" width="0"/><ScilabDouble as="integerParameters" height="0" width="0"/><ScilabInteger as="nbZerosCrossing" height="1" width="1" intPrecision="sci_int32"><data line="0" column="0" value="0"/></ScilabInteger><ScilabInteger as="nmode" height="1" width="1" intPrecision="sci_int32"><data line="0" column="0" value="0"/></ScilabInteger><ScilabDouble as="state" height="0" width="0"/><ScilabDouble as="dState" height="0" width="0"/><mxGeometry as="geometry" x="0.0" y="-10.0" width="40.0" height="60.0"/><SuperBlockDiagram as="child" ...>...</SuperBlockDiagram></BasicBlock>
criticalRules: Input 1 is D (Data), Input 2 is E (Enable)
